title: Front-End & UX/UI Design
body:
-   **UX/UI Design** — Figma, Design Systems Architecture: 10/10
-   **Modern CSS** — Tailwind / SASS / BEM: 10/10
-   **Optimization and Standards** — SEO, Core Web Vitals, Caching: 9.5/10

**AI and Workflow:** AI-Assisted Development. Advanced prompt engineering for modular architecture, automated documentation and sustainable code refactoring.

**Agile and Collaboration:** SCRUM, Agile Methodologies, Jira, Atlassian Suite, Slack, Microsoft Teams, Google Workspace. Git Flow and collaborative environments.

**Architecture and Tools:** VS Code, Docker, Webpack/Vite, PHPUnit, Redis, Memcached, MySQL Optimization.

**Web Ecosystem:** Timber/Twig, Advanced Custom Fields (ACF), Bedrock/Sage, Laravel Eloquent, Blade.
